mapper.sql: id, product_name, product_type, reference_id, description, cover_image, price, original_price, is_hot, is_new, is_recommended, sort_order, status, stock, sales_count, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO store_product ( product_name, product_type, reference_id, description, cover_image, price, original_price, is_hot, is_new, is_recommended, sort_order, status, stock, sales_count, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{productName}, #{productType}, #{referenceId}, #{description}, #{coverImage}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{isHot}, #{isNew}, #{isRecommended}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{stock}, #{salesCount}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM store_product WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT FROM store_product WHERE product_type = #{productType} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT FROM store_product WHERE is_hot = 1 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sales_count DESC, sort_order DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT FROM store_product WHERE is_new = 1 AND status = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT FROM store_product WHERE is_recommended = 1 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT 10
mapper.update: UPDATE store_product SET sales_count = #{salesCount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT pw.* FROM public_word pw INNER JOIN public_book_word pbw ON pw.id = pbw.word_id WHERE pbw.book_id = #{id} ORDER BY pbw.sort_order ASC
